questions.text: Two Sum: best approach for finding two indices that add up to target?
questions.explain: One pass with a dict: store seen values and check complement.

questions.text: Sliding window is often used for which type of problem?
questions.explain: Sliding window optimizes contiguous segment problems.

questions.text: What does 'memoization' mean in dynamic programming?
questions.explain: Memoization = store computed results to avoid recomputation.

questions.text: In Python, how do you create a max-heap with heapq?
questions.explain: heapq is a min-heap; negate values for a max-heap.

questions.text: Fastest way to check if a value exists in a list of 1M items?
questions.explain: set lookup is O(1); list 'in' is O(n).

questions.text: Which pattern fits 'find shortest path in unweighted graph'?
questions.explain: BFS gives shortest path when edges have unit weight.
